calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedents Estate By Equitable Adoption
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Broitman appeared by zoom for Mimi Wong Haymond (administrator).
Amy Harrington appeared by zoom for and with Megan Wong (petitioner) by zoom.
Rachel Rosenfeld appeared by zoom for Natalie Rose Haymond (beneficiary/objector).

The court noted that it does not appear that any written objections have been filed. Mrs. Rosenfeld stated that she filed a motion to be relieved as counsel. Pursuant to CRC 7.801, the court deems the objections waived due to no written objections having been filed. The Petition for Entitlement to Distribution, and the Waiver of Accounting and Petition for Approval of Statutory Fees, etc. are under submission with the court's intent to grant the petitions.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Continued To Apr-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedents Estate By Equitable Adoption
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Continued To Apr-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Edward Broitman, Esq., for Mimi Haymond, Petitioner.

Amy Harrington, Esq., for Megan Wong, Petitioner.

Rachel Rosenfeld, Esq., for Natalie Haymond, Objector.

At the outset, the court confirms with Ms. Rosenfeld that her client intends to file a formal objection to the Petition for Entitlement, etc., and requests a continuance to prepare and file her papers.

After additional discussion, the subject matters are continued to Apr-08-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The following briefing schedule is ordered by the court: 1) Ms. Rosenfeld is to file her objection to the above-mentioned petition by Mar-06-2024; 2) Responses are to be filed by Mar-20-2024.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of A Petition By Megan Wong Regarding Equitable Adoption
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Continued To Feb-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Continued To Dec-04-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Broitman appeared by zoom for and with Mimi Haymond by zoom.
Rachel Rosenfeld appeared by zoom for Natalie Haymond.
Megan Wong appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court noted that an objection is pending in the e file queue. Mrs. Rosenfeld stated that the objection has been filed, that she had a family emergency and that she did not have the opportunity to serve it on counsel. Mr. Broitman stated that Megan needs to figure out if she is going to need to hire counsel. The court stated that the issue of equitable adoption will need to go forward on an additional petition. Mrs. Rosenfeld stated that she would like a date certain for Ms. Wong to file her petition, and that if not filed by a specific date, she waives being an heir. Ms. Wong stated that she understands what is going on and that she is currently looking for an attorney. The court stated that it is not comfortable doing this today given how recent the objection was given to Mrs. Rosenfeld's opponent. The Waiver of Account and Petition for Approval of Statutory Administrator's Commissions, etc. is continued to December 4, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of filing of a petition by Megan Wong regarding equitable adoption is also set for December 4, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Bastain. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-28-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-15-2023 Continued To Apr-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Broitman appeared by zoom for Mimi Haymond (surviving spouse).

The court stated that it is confused by the submission of the spousal property petition and the election to distribute one third of the property. Mr. Broitman stated that there was some confusion between his paralegal and himself, that they wanted to be cautious, that they want 1/3 of the property to be confirmed to his client. The court stated that it wants to be clear as to what the 1/3 amount is and asked for clarification as to what percentage is reflected on the inventory and appraisal ("I & A"). Mr. Broitman stated that the I & A represents 2/3, that they used a date of death value. The court instructed Mr. Broitman to file a supplement that pulls back the election and that also provides dollar amounts as to what 1/3 is. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to April 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
